narrative:
Reading Township has 2,938 registered voters, with 51.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.6 percentage points.
